channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Meet Charlize Theron's 2 Kids, Jackson and August
item.description: The Oscar winner adopted her daughter Jackson in 2012 and her daughter August in 2015

item.title: Prince Louis' Birthday Photographer Shares a Candid Outtake on Instagram
item.description: Matt Porteous has been behind the camera for several of Prince William and Kate Middleton's family milestones

item.title: Who Was Michael Jackson's Dad? What to Know About the Late Joe Jackson and Their Tumultuous Father-Son Relationship
item.description: Michael Jackson’s father died from pancreatic cancer in June 2018

item.title: “Matlock” Boss Breaks Down Season 2 Finale Twist and Why Show Will Go in a 'Different Direction' Next Season (Exclusive)
item.description: Season 2 of 'Matlock' ended with a two-part finale that upset the show's dynamic in a major way

item.title: Prince William Jokes About His Height on Royal Outing After Prince George's Tall Stature Had Everyone Talking
item.description: Prince William is 6 feet 3 inches, and it appears his eldest son may be taking after him

item.title: 'Summer House' Cast Slams Amanda Batula in Alleged Audio Leak from Reunion
item.description: Audio has leaked from the “Summer House” reunion … and it seems like Bravoholics are getting the showdown they’ve been waiting for between former BFFs...

item.title: TMZ DC Asks Hegseth What Goes Through His Mind and Body When He Drops Bombs
item.description: TMZ DC has gone international, with an invite to the Secretary of War's news conference, and Jacob fired off a question that goes right to the psychol...

item.title: Jermaine Jackson Facing $6.5 Million Default Judgment in Rape Case
item.description: Jermaine Jackson could be facing a massive payout to his rape accuser -- without ever stepping foot in court. According to court docs obtained by TMZ,...

item.title: Brazilian Martial Arts Influencer Tamyris Teixeira Santos Found Dead on Beach
item.description: Tragedy in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil ... attorney and martial arts influencer Tamyris Teixeira Santos has been found dead on a beach at age 36 -- three d...

item.title: Natasha Lyonne Hangs Out With Anderson .Paak at TIME Event After Flight Drama
item.description: Natasha Lyonne is brushing off that plane drama the only way she knows how -- hanging with Anderson .Paak! Yup, the two were all smiles leaving the TI...
